title: lastrea calcarata var. falciloba
intro: Lastrea calcarata var. falciloba, also known as the falcate lastrea fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is an evergreen, perennial plant native to tropical regions and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The falcate lastrea fern can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
